seo.title: #mbfa Program Overview: Start Your Journey Here
seo.description: Dial up the challenge with #mbfa. See what the program includes, any equipment needed, and meet your trainer here.

trainers.bioBodi: Megan Davies is an NSCA certified personal trainer and creator of #mbf® Muscle Burns Fat® and #mbfa® Muscle Burns Fat Advanced® on Beachbody On Demand. Known for her straightforward workout style and upbeat personality, Megan knows what it takes to get you in the best shape of your life. Take one of her live BODi classes today!

data.descriptionShort: Follow #mbf with another 3 weeks of daily workouts and harder challenges.
data.descriptionLong: After #mbf, blast into the next 3 weeks with #mbfa, where Megan dials up the challenges and intensity to push you harder for an even greater total-body transformation.

modules.equipment: Light, Medium & Heavy Weights, BOD Rope & Mat*

modules.title: Is #mbfa Right For Me?
modules.content: For this 3 week program, Super Trainer Megan Davies dials up the intensity and the moves from #mbf, while you scorch calories and drop pounds. You’ll do a combination of strength-training and cardio workouts as you get lean and strong, reveal your abs, and tighten everything for a total-body transformation.

modules.title: What Are the Workouts Like?
modules.content: In these daily 25-40 minute workouts, Megan will push you to work harder and longer, and challenge you with Megan Minutes, during which you’ll do one move for 1 minute with a heavy weight to build strength, muscle, and definition.

modules.title: Tools and Equipment
modules.content: Read the #mbfa Get Started Guide to prepare for the program and download the Workout Calendar to see your day’s workout and track your progress. The BODi Guide to Nutrition and accompanying Introduction to Nutrition videos will show you how to eat to optimize your results. You’ll need a set of light, medium and heavy dumbbells, a mat, and the BOD Rope, the Cordless Indoor Jump Rope.

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.

trainers.bio: Megan Davies is an NSCA certified personal trainer and creator of #mbf® Muscle Burns Fat® and #mbfa® Muscle Burns Fat Advanced® on Beachbody On Demand. Known for her straightforward workout style and upbeat personality, Megan knows what it takes to get you in the best shape of your life. Take one of her live BODi classes today!

modules.title: Nicole P. Lost 32 lbs. and 21 in. doing  #mbf and #mbfa.
modules.testimonial: “You will not regret this program. I have tried many programs before, only to get little to no results. #mbf and #mbfa get you the results you've always wanted!"
modules.disclaimer: Results achieved in 12 weeks using #mbf and #mbfa with Shakeology and BODi Performance supplements.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvMobq4.title: LIIFT4
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvMobq4.description: Build muscle and burn calories with classic weightlifting and HIIT cardio.
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvMobq4.descriptionShort: Build muscle and burn calories with classic weightlifting and HIIT cardio.
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvMobq4.descriptionLong: LIIFT4 combines heavy lifting and intense cardio to transform your body in 4 days a week. And with 32 unique, real-time workouts, you’ll never get bored, because you’ll never do the same one twice.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvNVfyi.title: Getting Started with #mbf & #mbfa
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvNVfyi.descriptionLong: Watch this video to learn everything you need to start #mbf and #mbfa. You'll get an overview of the program, the equipment you need, and how dialing-in your nutrition and using BODi Performance supplements can help you build the body you've always wanted.

trainers.bio: Super Trainer Megan Davies is an NSCA certified personal trainer and creator of #mbf Muscle Burns Fat, #mbfa Muscle Burns Fat Advanced, and Sure Thing. After appearing on BODi’s fitness reality show, THE 20s, Megan became the next Super Trainer and created Clean Week. Her passion for learning about physiology, health, fitness, and technique fuels every program she creates. Her down-to-earth, empowering workout style and upbeat personality make you feel like you’re training with a best friend.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvNVgFs.title: Meet Megan Davies
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvNVgFs.descriptionLong: Get to know Super Trainer Megan Davies, including why she became a trainer, what she learned on The 20s, and why she created #mbf & #mbfa.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvNVtQO.title: #mbf
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvNVtQO.description: Build muscle and burn fat with daily strength-training and cardio workouts.
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvNVtQO.descriptionShort: Build muscle and burn fat with daily strength-training and cardio workouts.
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvNVtQO.descriptionLong: Get leaner, get stronger, get healthier as you ignite your metabolism and incinerate fat. For three weeks, you'll follow weightlifting and cardio workouts that are set to the music beat, so you know the intensity you’ll need to get maximum results.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvOZgfY.title: 6 Weeks of THE WORK
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvOZgfY.description: Relentless functional training to achieve results you’ve never experienced.
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvOZgfY.descriptionShort: Relentless functional training to achieve results you’ve never experienced.
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvOZgfY.descriptionLong: Leave your excuses at the door. For six intense weeks, you’ll take on relentless functional training to help you gain muscle, drop body fat, and achieve results you’ve never experienced before.

Her passion for learning about physiology, health, fitness, and technique fuels every program she creates. Her down-to-earth, empowering workout style and upbeat personality make you feel like you’re training with a best friend.

purchaseOptions.title: BODi Membership Required
purchaseOptions.subtitle: Workouts that meet you where you are, keep you coming back, and empower you to reach your goals. Get BODi now to start your first block.
